title: Biomes Addon
description: Mod that adds new biomes to spice up your world.
body:
# A mod that adds new biomes to spice up your world.

New Biomes,Food, and Blocks that allow for a more fun adventure with new experiences.
The new biomes allow for a better adventure with new food and new places to explore through as you play on your world.  Biomes also have unique features like how some have large trees and some have special plants that give food to help your adventure.


![Amethyst Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/537ad90e61067913ee4dd4181e2d39002af5a4d7.png)
Above is a picture of the Amethyst Forest, also seen in the image gallery.


(Content is in a very early version and many things will be changed during the development process.)

See images tab for some images of some biomes that are added. Created with MCreator
